name: Compact skill entrypoints delegate full instructions
instruction: Each `skills/*/SKILL.md` file must stay compact and point agents to `references/full-instructions.md` for detailed workflow instructions.
relevant_when: Markdown file named `SKILL.md` directly under a directory in `skills/`.
context: Compact skill entrypoints help agents activate the right skill quickly while preserving detailed guidance in reference files.
scope_reason: A single SKILL.md file contains its own length and reference-link evidence.

checklist.name: entrypoint-is-compact
checklist.rule: The SKILL.md file is compact enough to read on one screen, with no long embedded reference workflow or extensive command transcript.

checklist.name: links-full-instructions
checklist.rule: The SKILL.md file explicitly points to `references/full-instructions.md` before asking the agent to make changes or run project commands.
